subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath caused the showers of bounty to descend from the heaven of eternity, that thereby the hearts of the peoples of the world may be verdant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل من سماء القدم امطار الکرم لیخضر به قلوب اهل العالم و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @unity; oneness of humanity
